story.heading: Our Story
paragraphs: Ellianna's started in 2019 with a single fryer and a farmers-market tent on Elm Street.
We hand-roll every donut, proof our yeast dough overnight, and glaze each batch by hand so nothing sits on a rack for more than an hour.
Today the same values still guide the shop: real ingredients, patient technique, and donuts worth showing up early for.
